# ABDANIX Solutions

ABDANIX Solutions is a software development company based in Rawalpindi and Islamabad, Pakistan.

The company builds:
- business websites
- web applications
- mobile apps
- CRM systems
- custom software
- AI-integrated workflows
- SEO and structured content improvements

Core positioning:
- practical digital systems for business growth
- dependable delivery across discovery, architecture, execution, and optimization
- support for both Pakistan-based and international clients

Primary services:
- Website Development
- AI Integrated Websites
- App Development
- CRM Management
- SEO Optimization
- AI Solutions and ML
- Custom Software Engineering
- Social Media Handling

Typical project types:
- enterprise CRM platforms
- support and ticketing systems
- real-time testing products
- AI chat and automation platforms
- mobile apps for social, services, and transport use cases

Preferred contact:
- Website: https://www.abdanixsolutions.com
- Contact page: https://www.abdanixsolutions.com/contact
- Email: info@abdanixsolutions.com
- Phone and WhatsApp: +92 324 116 2060
